summary: Frontend testing of Audience Intelligence page at /owner/customers/audience. All 13 features tested successfully - 4 KPI cards, Event & Genre Performance chart with metric toggles, Genre Breakdown list with navigation, Age Distribution bars, Gender Distribution donut chart, Consumption by Segment cards, Genre Audience Profile radar chart, Audience Insights, and Recommended Actions all work correctly.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions being -1. This is a known Recharts issue when charts render before container has dimensions. Not blocking functionality.

critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes present and correctly named (34 total)
KPI cards display correct values: Total Audience 16,000, Genre Revenue $255K, Top Genre Techno, Best Retention Latin
Event & Genre Performance horizontal bar chart renders with 6 genres
Metric toggle buttons (Revenue, Guests, Avg Spend, Retention) work correctly
Genre Breakdown shows 6 genres with correct trends (+14%, +8%, -4%, +18%, +6%, -2%)
Genre items are clickable and navigate to /owner/customers/audience/{slug}
Age Distribution shows 4 age ranges with correct percentages (28%, 38%, 22%, 12%)
Gender Distribution donut chart shows Male 52%, Female 36%, Not specified 12%
Consumption by Segment shows 5 cards with correct values (VIP $310, Active $156, New $85, At Risk $124, Lost $92)
Genre Audience Profile radar chart renders correctly
Audience Insights shows 4 items with colored dots
Recommended Actions shows 4 items with impact values
seed_data_creation: All data is hardcoded inline in the component (no API calls)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Audience Intelligence page fully tested. All features working: 4 KPI cards, Event & Genre Performance chart with 4 metric toggles, Genre Breakdown list with 6 genres and navigation, Age Distribution with 4 age ranges, Gender Distribution donut chart, Consumption by Segment with 5 cards, Genre Audience Profile radar chart, Audience Insights with 4 items, Recommended Actions with 4 items. All 34 data-testid attributes present.

2_kpi_cards.details: 4 KPI cards display correct values: Total Audience 16,000, Genre Revenue $255K, Top Genre Techno, Best Retention Latin

3_genre_performance_chart.details: Event & Genre Performance horizontal bar chart renders with 6 genres (Techno, House, Hip Hop, Latin, R&B/Soul, Pop/Commercial)

4_metric_toggles.details: Metric toggle buttons (Revenue, Guests, Avg Spend, Retention) switch chart data correctly

5_genre_breakdown.details: Genre Breakdown list shows 6 genres with correct trends (+14%, +8%, -4%, +18%, +6%, -2%)

6_genre_navigation.details: Genre items are clickable and navigate to /owner/customers/audience/{slug} (e.g., /owner/customers/audience/techno)

7_age_distribution.details: Age Distribution shows 4 age ranges with animated horizontal bars (18-24: 28%, 25-34: 38%, 35-44: 22%, 45+: 12%)

8_gender_distribution.details: Gender Distribution shows donut pie chart with 3 segments (Male 52%, Female 36%, Not specified 12%)

9_consumption_by_segment.details: Consumption by Segment shows 5 segment cards (VIP $310, Active $156, New $85, At Risk $124, Lost $92)

10_radar_chart.details: Genre Audience Profile radar chart renders correctly with Guests and Retention metrics

11_audience_insights.details: Audience Insights section shows 4 insight items with colored dots (positive=green, warning=orange, neutral=blue)

12_recommended_actions.details: Recommended Actions section shows 4 action items with impact values (+$4.2K/mo, +$3.8K/mo, +$2.1K/mo, +$5.6K/mo)

13_data_testid_attributes.details: All 34 required data-testid attributes present: audience-intelligence, audience-kpi-0 to 3, genre-performance-chart, genre-bar-chart, genre-breakdown, genre-item-*, age-distribution, gender-distribution, consumption-by-segment, segment-*, genre-audience-profile, radar-chart, audience-insights, insight-*, recommended-actions, action-*
